nasb.text: Is anyone among you suffering? Then he must pray. Is anyone cheerful? He is to sing praises.

esv.text: Is anyone among you suffering? Let him pray. Is anyone cheerful? Let him sing praise.

cnv.text: 你們中間有人受苦嗎？他就應該禱告。有人心情愉快嗎？他就應該歌頌。

ccb.text: 你们中间正在受苦的人应该祷告，喜乐的人应该唱歌赞美，

csbs.text: 你们中间谁受苦，就应该祷告；谁欢喜，就应该歌颂。
